title: Macaroni Indulgence
description: A rich and creamy macaroni dish inspired by Japanese flavors. Perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Cook macaroni according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large saucepan, melt 2 tbsp of butter over medium heat.
Add soy sauce and whisk until combined.
Add mascarpone cheese and whisk until smooth.
Add mozzarella cheese and stir until melted.
Add cooked macaroni to the cheese sauce and stir until combined.
Transfer the macaroni mixture to a baking dish.
Top with remaining 2 tbsp of butter and chopped scallions.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes.
